title: The Last Heir
prompt: A young mage discovers she is the last heir of an ancient magical bloodline. She must journey across the realm to find three lost artifacts before a dark sorcerer does.

characters.name: Lyra
characters.description: A 19-year-old mage with silver hair and violet eyes. She grew up in a small village knowing nothing of her true heritage.
characters.personality: Curious, brave, sometimes reckless, but deeply compassionate.

characters.name: Kael
characters.description: A 25-year-old former soldier turned wanderer. He carries a cursed sword that whispers to him.
characters.personality: Stoic, honorable, haunted by his past but loyal to those he cares about.

characters.name: Shadowmancer Vex
characters.description: The dark sorcerer seeking the artifacts. Once a respected scholar who was corrupted by forbidden magic.
characters.personality: Intelligent, patient, believes the ends justify the means.

outline.title: The Awakening
outline.summary: Lyra discovers her magical abilities when her village is attacked. A mysterious stranger (Kael) saves her and reveals her heritage.

outline.title: The First Artifact
outline.summary: Lyra and Kael journey to the Crystal Caves to find the first artifact. They face traps and encounter Vex's minions.

outline.title: The Betrayal
outline.summary: A trusted ally reveals their true allegiance to Vex. Lyra must make a difficult choice that tests her character.
